title: XRP Price: The 3 Signals Inside Today’s CLARITY Act Markup That Decide What’s Next
description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) slipped below $80,000 on Wednesday, and U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $635 million in outflows, which is the biggest since January. The broader crypto market is bleeding on hot inflation data that just pushed Fed rate cut expectations into 2027. However, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) is holding at $1.45, up around 1.2% on ... XRP Price: The 3 Signals Inside Today’s CLARITY Act Markup That Decide What’s Next

title: Bitcoin ETF Outflows Just Hit a 3-Month High of $635 Million: What’s Driving the Exit?
description: A few weeks ago, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ETFs were the bull case. The funds pulled in $3.29 billion combined in March and April, marking the first sustained inflow streak of 2026. However, the streak snapped yesterday.  U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs bled $635 million, recording their largest outflow since late January. The reversal wasn’t a one-off ... Bitcoin ETF Outflows Just Hit a 3-Month High of $635 Million: What’s Driving the Exit?

title: Why Crypto Traders Are Suddenly Talking About Quantum Computing Again
description: Google Quantum AI said in March 2026 that breaking the security systems that protect Bitcoin wallets and Ether could take fewer than 500,000 physical qubits, far below older estimates in the millions. That doesn’t mean crypto is breaking tomorrow, but it explains why traders are watching Zcash and the wider privacy coin market again.The post Why Crypto Traders Are Suddenly Talking About Quantum Computing Again appeared first on Memeburn.
